channel.title: sreekar.coffee
channel.description: Personal coffee blog — AeroPress experiments, tasting notes, and coffee rabbit holes.

item.title: Cold Ruined Coffee
item.description: Cup #12 was supposed to be an Inverted AeroPress brew. But I just brewed it the usual way.

item.title: Dark Meets Light
item.description: I tried dark-roast beans. I tried light-roast beans. But what if I mix both?

item.title: Caught the Sour
item.description: And finally, I tried those light-roast beans from Goa! They are soo good! I could brew my first sour cup with them.

item.title: Astringent Again
item.description: I've been dying to try those light-roasted beans from Goa, but today was hectic and I didn't want to rush it. So I stuck with my usual dark roast.

item.title: Coffee in Goa
item.description: So I work remotely, but I finally got to meet my team in Goa. And I brought my Aeropress along to brew cup #7 for them.

item.title: My Coffee Sweet Spot
item.description: Cup #6 was a winner! It had that same magic as cup #3—perfectly balanced, not too sour or bitter. Just right.

item.title: Chasing Sourness
item.description: It's Saturday, a holiday. And that means more coffeeeee!

item.title: Perfect Cup, Cold Brew, and Coffee Book
item.description: Cup #3 turned out to be a really good one. I'm so happy about it. It just made my day!

item.title: Astringent Coffee
item.description: Sounds like a coffee brand, but it isn't!

item.title: Bad Brew
item.description: Everything that could go wrong, went wrong today! 🥲

item.title: First Brew
item.description: After sipping instant coffee for years, I finally bade bye to it and bought an AeroPress!
